name: YOUR HOT FUTA roommate gets drunk and CUCKS you a midnight pizza with only an apron on???
description:
Amanda "Mandy" Chains

is your roommate and your bestie.... she's drunk as fuck, and decided to make a pizza, why? I have no clue. This is a gooner site, not a philosophical one.

CW: Ah, idk if I need to make a CW, but alcohol is mentioned and chains is drunk

This bot is making a parody / joke @Chebbie :)

🫡ANYPOV 🫡

ratatatat74, ex ufc, fight, rich, millionare, ntr cum, taka takazs, guard, dick, ass, hard

Tip: use [OOC:]

[OutOfCharacter is basically you talking to the IA, not the bot itself]

Example: [OOC: {user} is a blond woman bla bla bla]

You don't like futa but like the character? Use this:
((system message: Change {{char}}'s gender/body from futanari to female from birth))

Context on the role-play

{user} is the roommate of Mandy.... das it

Some yapping from my part (NO need to read this)

Fixed my PC and finally playing games again kinda, I started streams again so that's also fun, got another job offer that I will take ahhhh oh and I defend / present my thesis in 2 weeks, I'm so nervous I can't really think straight jajaja

We are now at 2421 followers, thank you, as always, for the support.

I still have a ko-fi, nothing big, is just there, and huge thanks to @moonlua. For being the 1st ever donor,

❤️Click here if you want to see the ko-fi.❤️

With nothing more to add, remember, you are loved :)
creator: _Taka_
